bullets: Developed and delivered frontend code for responsive, cross-browser compatible web interfaces
Built AI-powered content automation workflows reducing manual publishing effort significantly
Designed social media creatives aligned with brand identity across digital platforms
Provided end-to-end digital asset support for an EV Exhibition including content and creatives
Built physics-informed XGBoost + SVM + Neural Network ensemble for Au/Ag nanocluster stability prediction achieving 85%+ accuracy and 0.912 ROC-AUC on 11 DFT-derived features across 200 samples
Curated 200-sample literature-derived nanocluster dataset; identified HOMO-LUMO gap (25.7%) and formation energy (23.0%) as dominant stability predictors via interpretable ML
Reviewed ML-in-nanomaterials literature (Manna 2023, Häkkinen 2008, Taylor & Mpourmpakis 2017) to directly inform feature selection and model architecture
Deployed real-time stability prediction web app on Streamlit with interactive dataset dashboard and model interpretability visualisations
Built a Student Performance Prediction model using Random Forest & XGBoost achieving ~85% classification accuracy on the UCI Student Performance dataset
Compared 3 ML algorithms (Logistic Regression, Random Forest, XGBoost) and documented performance trade-offs across precision, recall, and F1-score
Deployed the model as an interactive Streamlit web app enabling real-time student risk assessment
Designed a social + commerce hybrid profile combining posts, brand affiliations, and member codes for a blockchain-based authenticated items platform
Translated complex blockchain ownership provenance into a skimmable timeline-style UI reducing cognitive load for multi-step buy/sell history
Built a dark-mode design system from scratch establishing color tokens, typography, icon usage, and card variants used consistently across all screens
Delivered production-ready developer-handoff mockups at 390×844px (iPhone 14 spec) with precise spacing and auto-layout grids

Designed and deployed the company's first ML-powered crypto trend-prediction system from scratch, replacing manual analysis with an ensemble XGBoost pipeline on 18 engineered on-chain and market features
Improved directional accuracy from 55% to 88% and reduced MAE by 40.7% versus prior naive baseline
Delivered a production Streamlit dashboard and 30-day auto-regressive forecast pipeline with volatility-based confidence bands
Collaborated cross-functionally within a 7-person development team translating raw market data into digestible summaries
Designed a comprehensive multi-module fintech app UI covering 3 core tabs — Financial, E-Commerce, and Wallet — ensuring visual consistency across all screens
Built complete screen flows including home dashboard, product listings, wallet & card management, transaction history, and credit score checker
Designed intuitive card management interface with live balances, VISA card details, and quick-action buttons
Created financial products discovery flow featuring offer boxes, referral programs, and bank partnerships
